query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameStatus, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, modelRunAt, publishedToFeed, publishedModel FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY startTime ASC;
